scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Run pnpm dev:api and pnpm dev:web in separate terminals during the stabilization phase.')"
scripts.verify:baseline: pnpm build:api && pnpm lint:web && pnpm build:web && docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml config && docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.prod.yml config
scripts.verify:production: pnpm build:api && pnpm lint:web && pnpm build:web && docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.prod.yml config
scripts.seed:clear: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml exec -T api pnpm --filter @fyp/api seed:clear
scripts.seed:demo: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.dev.yml exec -T api pnpm --filter @fyp/api seed:reset
scripts.seed:bootstrap: docker compose -f infra/docker/compose.prod.yml exec -T -e SEED_MODE=bootstrap api node dist/scripts/seedDemoData.js
